shorts.title_distilled: Army Under Secretary Tours Scranton Army Ammunition Plant.

The ceremony brought together family, friends, and local officials to recognize the [...]

shorts.title: Bill seeks tougher penalties for crimes against law enforcement
shorts.title_distilled: Bill seeks tougher penalties for crimes against law enforcement.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A bill aimed at increasing minimum sentences for individuals who attempt to murder law enforcement officers is moving forward in the Pennsylvania State Senate. The proposed legislation, sponsored by State Sen. Lisa Baker, seeks to establish significantly tougher prison terms for these crimes. Senate Bill 1284, which recently received approval [...]
shorts.content: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A bill aimed at increasing minimum sentences for individuals who attempt to murder law enforcement officers is moving forward in the Pennsylvania State Senate. The proposed legislation, sponsored by State Sen. Lisa Baker, seeks to establish significantly tougher prison terms for these crimes. Senate Bill 1284, which recently received approval [...]
shorts.content_distilled: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY  — A bill aimed at increasing minimum sentences for individuals who attempt to murder law enforcement officers is moving forward in the Pennsylvania State Senate.

shorts.title: Spring brings increased road work
shorts.description: DUNMORE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — As spring weather returns, so do flowers, insects, and construction season across northeastern Pennsylvania. "So, it is all weather-dependent, you know, it rains a lot. So, everything is weather- and temperature-dependent,” said Liz Fabri, PennDOT District 4 Press Office The third week of April marks National Work Zone Safety Awareness [...]
